perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a white dress stands between two men in white shirts and ties against a yellow studio background. (2) She begins a choreographed dance routine, smiling and gesturing as she speaks to the camera. (3) The two men present trays filled with colorful sanitary pad packaging, which she displays to the viewer. (4) She holds and poses with various fast food items including a burger, a tray of donuts, and a box of fried chicken. (5) The video concludes with a series of quick dance poses and close-ups of the woman smiling enthusiastically while holding the food and the product.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks rhythmically in Mandarin Chinese with a friendly, persuasive tone. (2) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music with a strong electronic beat begins and plays continuously. (3) Enthusiastic male voices join in, shouting names of food items like 'Hamburger' and 'Fried Chicken' accompanied by background laughter. (4) The music remains at a consistent high energy, synchronizing with the visual cuts and dance moves until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '我是愛吃東西 意志力薄弱的 小鳥胃' (Functional text: Introduction of character traits). (2) '愛康團購買了嗎' (Hook text: Asking if the audience has joined the group buy for the brand Icon). (3) '480片' and '390元' (Functional text: Detailing product quantity and price). (4) '省下來的可以買！ 漢堡 / 甜甜圈 / 炸雞' (Decorative text: Highlighting that the money saved can buy treats). (5) '不買嗎?' (Hook text: Final call to action).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Value Proposition -> Reward Comparison (Food) -> CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 2 male supporting dancers/assistants
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with dark hair tied in a bun, wearing a white square-neck puff-sleeve dress and light pink shoes.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean studio setup featuring a large yellow backdrop and ceiling-mounted studio lights.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut synced with music beats

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This is a promotional video for 'Icon' (愛康) sanitary pads. It uses a high-energy dance vlog format to explain a cost-saving group-buy offer. The narrative logic equates the savings from the sanitary pads to the ability to purchase 'rewards' like burgers and fried chicken, appealing to a young female audience through humor and relatable lifestyle themes.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of group buy, display of packaging, and price comparison.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy dancing combined with fast-paced promotional dialogue.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages 'foodie' culture to make a mundane product (sanitary pads) more engaging through contrast.
